void __thiscall CClientSocket::ProcessPacket(CClientSocket *this, CInPacket *a2)
{
  int op;
  op = CInPacket::Decode2(a2);
  switch ( op )
  {
    case 0x11u:
      CLogin::OnFoo(this, a2);
      break;
    case 0x12u:
    case 0x13u:
      CLogin::OnBarBaz(this, a2);
      break;
    case 200u:
      CLogin::OnCheckPasswordResult(this, a2);
      break;
    case 0x20u:
      sub_5E1230(this, a2);
      break;
    case 0x21u:
      CLogin::OnAccountInfoResult(this, a2);
      break;
    case 0x22u:
      CLogin::OnWorldInformation(this, a2);
      break;
    default:
      break;
  }
}
